name: ScamShield AI
tagline: An AI fraud investigator for messages, websites, emails, QR codes, jobs, and investment pitches.
description: ScamShield AI helps everyday users investigate suspicious messages, links, emails, QR codes, job offers, and investment pitches. It combines a deterministic evidence engine with Anna-hosted LLM synthesis, gives an explainable risk score, recommends safe next actions, saves compact history, and can generate a cyber-crime report draft for the user to review.
